entry.message: Community agent run with posting enabled

window.operatingHours: Agent checks 10:00-19:00 America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires; War Room opens weekdays after 11:15 AM ARG; closed Saturdays and Sundays

items.message:
Hey team! 👋

Today's [**Stargazer Axiom daily thread**](https://community.outlier.ai/t/daily-thread-07-08/2903090) is up.

Please take a few minutes to read it before tasking today. The topic is **Test Quality**, with a reminder about **F2P = Fail in Phase 1, Pass in Phase 2. For the right reason.**.

Quick rule: If your F2P test passes before the gold patch, it's not an F2P test.



Use the daily thread for blockers, Cursor issues, validation/eval problems, onboarding questions, or task-related doubts 🙌
items.ignoredReason: Manager announcement authored by the configured bot user, not a contributor support request.

items.message:
Team,

We have confirmed that the following contributors have completed onboarding and are ready to begin work on the project:

latam.coder2305@outlier.ai
pandeyshubhranshu6@gmail.com
latam.coder787@remotasks.com
latam.coder2217@outlier.ai
latam.coder1989@outlier.ai
latam.coder056@remotasks.com
latam.coder2609@outlier.ai
latam.coder1243@remotasks.com
latam.coder2002@outlier.ai
coder_turkey_referral_320@outlier.ai

To proceed with tasking, please complete the following mandatory step:

1. Join the War Room at https://scale.zoom.us/j/91510346485?pwd=IEPPxvhcHt1W25AXq01eMC3Ynn5SsO.1#success (Monday-Friday, 11:15 AM to 7:00 PM ARG)
2. Enter the breakout room called Stargazer - Team
3. Request Cursor access from the QMs

We recommend working in the War Room while you set up your environment to achieve better results and get immediate support.

If you have questions, reach out in the War Room.
items.ignoredReason: Authored by the configured manager/bot user.
